critic_findings.message: getAlerts() cyclomatic complexity is 10 (max 8). The 2 new if-blocks for ci_stale and approval_stale pushed it from 8 to 10. Extract a data-driven approach: define an array of {attentionKey, icon, label, color} objects and iterate, or split into getCIAlerts + getReviewAlerts helpers.

design-audit.message: Design audit not yet performed — run /rq:design-audit for UI audit
